rules.rule_text:
rule Raccoon2
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "Raccoon2 system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "System Information: " ascii
		$x2 = "User ID:" ascii
		$x3 = "Last seen:" ascii
		$x4 = "Build:" ascii
		$x5 = "IP info:" ascii
		$x6 = "Installed applications:" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
